{"action":"opened","number":18785,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/pulls/18785","id":2057382639,"node_id":"PR_kwDOAdw-Nc56oSrv","html_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18785","diff_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18785.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18785.patch","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/issues/18785","number":18785,"state":"open","locked":false,"title":"[24.1] Fix RegisterForm.vue not appending prefix when set.  ","user":{"login":"mcuaya1","id":80364641,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgwMzY0NjQx","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/80364641?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1","html_url":"https://github.com/mcuaya1","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/mcuaya1/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"body":"Hello,

I've been working on configuring a Galaxy instance (Galaxy 24.1) for work. For our purposes, Galaxy is served under a prefix specified in the galaxy.yml config file; however, I noticed that when trying to create a user through the admin panel, I would be redirected back to /admin/users without my specified prefix. The user is still created successfully, just that I have to attach the prefix myself to return it successfully.

![issue](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f32146ba-ef6e-49de-89d4-cf237f429b0a)

At first I thought this might have been a misconfiguration in our nginx setup; however, I've been able to recreate the issue on a virtual machine running Debian 12 and on my personal machine running Ubuntu 23.10, neither of which has nginx configured. My co-worker and I dug through the source code and narrowed down the issue to RegisterForm.vue and noticed there doesn't seem to be anything in place to redirect with a prefix.

The proposed change fixes this issue, and after rebuilding Galaxy and testing on different machines by specifying a prefix in the galaxy.yml config file, the admin panel redirects with the specified prefix.

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)
- [ ] I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.
- [ ] Instructions for manual testing are as follows:
  1. [add testing steps and prerequisites here if you didn't write automated tests covering all your changes]

## License
- [x] I agree to license these and all my past contributions to the core galaxy codebase under the [MIT license](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT).

authorization"},{"id":1342637137,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWwxMzQyNjM3MTM3","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/labels/area/client","name":"area/client","color":"006b75","default":false,"description":""},{"id":1454348962,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWwxNDU0MzQ4OTYy","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/labels/area/packaging","name":"area/packaging","color":"006b75","default":false,"description":""}],"state":"closed","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/milestones/27","html_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/milestone/27","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/milestones/27/labels","id":10606334,"node_id":"MI_kwDOAdw-Nc4Aodb-","number":27,"title":"24.1","description":"","creator":{"login":"jdavcs","id":6132258,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjYxMzIyNTg=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/6132258?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs","html_url":"https://github.com/jdavcs","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"open_issues":6,"closed_issues":407,"state":"closed","created_at":"2024-02-26T16:02:27Z","updated_at":"2024-09-06T07:35:36Z","due_on":null,"closed_at":"2024-06-20T16:48:56Z"},"comments":1,"created_at":"2024-09-06T07:31:54Z","updated_at":"2024-09-06T07:45:39Z","closed_at":"2024-09-06T07:35:36Z","author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"draft":true,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/pulls/18785","html_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18785","diff_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18785.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18785.patch","merged_at":null},"body":"Hello,

I've been working on configuring a Galaxy instance (Galaxy 24.1) for work. For our purposes, Galaxy is served under a prefix specified in the galaxy.yml config file; however, I noticed that when trying to create a user through the admin panel, I would be redirected back to /admin/users without my specified prefix. The user is still created successfully, just that I have to attach the prefix myself to return it successfully.

![issue](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f32146ba-ef6e-49de-89d4-cf237f429b0a)

At first I thought this might have been a misconfiguration in our nginx setup; however, I've been able to recreate the issue on a virtual machine running Debian 12 and on my personal machine running Ubuntu 23.10, neither of which has nginx configured. My co-worker and I dug through the source code and narrowed down the issue to RegisterForm.vue and noticed there doesn't seem to be anything in place to redirect with a prefix.

The proposed change fixes this issue, and after rebuilding Galaxy and testing on different machines by specifying a prefix in the galaxy.yml config file, the admin panel redirects with the specified prefix.

## How to test the changes?
(Select all options that apply)
- [ ] I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.
- [ ] Instructions for manual testing are as follows:
  1. [add testing steps and prerequisites here if you didn't write automated tests covering all your changes]

## License
- [x] I agree to license these and all my past contributions to the core galaxy codebase under the [MIT license](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT).

s/jdavcs/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/jdavcs/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"open_issues":54,"closed_issues":104,"state":"open","created_at":"2024-05-14T14:03:11Z","updated_at":"2024-09-09T12:35:25Z","due_on":null,"closed_at":null},"comments":2,"created_at":"2024-09-06T07:51:07Z","updated_at":"2024-09-09T20:32:31Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"draft":false,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/galaxyproject/galaxy/pulls/18786","html_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18786","diff_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18786.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/galaxyproject/galaxy/pull/18786.patch","merged_at":null},"body":"Hello,

I've been working on configuring a Galaxy instance (Galaxy 24.1) for work. For our purposes, Galaxy is served under a prefix specified in the galaxy.yml config file; however, I noticed that when trying to create a user through the admin panel, I would be redirected back to /admin/users without my specified prefix. The user is still created successfully, just that I have to attach the prefix myself to return it successfully.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a84db9a9-18d6-4c2e-8cf5-801e9f7be5d1


At first I thought this might have been a misconfiguration in our nginx setup; however, I've been able to recreate the issue on a virtual machine running Debian 12 and on my personal machine running Ubuntu 23.10, neither of which has nginx configured. My co-worker and I dug through the source code and narrowed down the issue to RegisterForm.vue and noticed there doesn't seem to be anything in place to redirect with a prefix.

The proposed change fixes this issue, and after rebuilding Galaxy and testing on different machines by specifying a prefix in the galaxy.yml config file, the admin panel redirects with the specified prefix.

## How to test the changes?
Run galaxy with change applied.

(Select all options that apply)
- [ ] I've included appropriate [automated tests](https://docs.galaxyproject.org/en/latest/dev/writing_tests.html).
- [x] This is a refactoring of components with existing test coverage.
